title: WorkDirective
description: A directive that captures work intent and entities. Derived from work-activity-ontology (NL-first Intent/Entity model). Carries 10 Intent types as canonical enumeration.

parent_id.description: Parent directive ID for nested work hierarchies (optional).

intent.description: Work activity intent (create_task, update_status, log_work, ...). Source: ontology/09-work-activity-ontology.md.

due_date.description: Target completion date for this directive.

status.description: 6-state lifecycle: created → validated → dispatched → in_progress → completed/failed (P0 enhancement)

source_worklog_id.description: WorkLog ID that generated this directive (for traceability). P0 enhancement: Provenance Links (R020).

source_rule_ids.description: Rule IDs (R001-R020) that triggered this directive creation. P0 enhancement: Provenance Links (R020).

source_document.description: Original source document reference (e.g., meeting notes, email subject, file path). P0 enhancement: Provenance Links (R020).
